curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Only one non-test source file modified: RedirectUtils.java. The vulnerability is in the verifyRedirectUri method which did not validate redirect URI schemes. A wildcard pattern like '*' would match any URI including javascript: schemes, enabling XSS via form POST responses. The patch adds a scheme check after matching, rejecting non-http(s) schemes unless the matched pattern explicitly starts with that scheme. L3 area narrowed to OIDC redirect utilities; L3 description adds SAML/OIDC and wildcard context. Location derived from the patch diff.
